creator: knowledgeispower80@gmail.com
text:
Based on the fixes in the qt6-base 6.7 branch. Cups is now a build time dependency for devel/qt6-base. So just make config and add cups. In the ports directory. 
Here is the upstream information on it:
https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-126594?jql=project%20%3D%20QTBUG%20AND%20text%20~%20%226.7.2%20qtbase%3A%20missing%20cups%22%20ORDER%20BY%20created%20DESC

and patch
https://codereview.qt-project.org/c/qt/qtbase/+/571030/2/src/printsupport/CMakeLists.txt

There is an optional upgrade available v6.8.0-beta2.
